intro: Harmona Valley — a fractured land where living remnants of an ancient bond drift through the wilds.
They are called HARMONS: creatures carrying hidden memories of the old world.
Long ago, The Chorus linked every living thing to the land. Then came The Fracture.
Strange disturbances ripple across the Routes. You arrive in Harmona Rest to uncover the truth.

lore.chorus: The Chorus once linked all creatures and the land in perfect resonance.
lore.fracture: The Fracture shattered that bond, isolating regions and scattering ancient memories.
lore.veil: The Veil believes restoring The Chorus could awaken a sealed Primordial — they may not be wrong.
lore.rangers: Route Rangers are guardians who test whether you can restore a region's lost resonance.
lore.sigils: Each Resonance Sigil you earn permanently changes the world — paths, weather, and hidden places.
lore.archive: The Memory Archive records every Harmon discovery and the history they remember.

stages.title: A New Explorer
stages.objective: Choose your first Harmon and head north to Route 1.
stages.hint: Pick a starter, then leave Harmona Rest through the north gate.

stages.title: First Resonance
stages.objective: Win your first wild battle on Route 1 and feel the valley stir.
stages.hint: Walk through tall grass to find wild Harmons.

stages.title: Disturbance in the Wood
stages.objective: Defeat Rival Sabo in the Echowood (Route 2).
stages.hint: Sabo hunts the same signals you do — he waits near the north of Route 2.

stages.title: Scorch Route Trial
stages.objective: Cross the desert and defeat Ranger Sol to earn a Resonance Sigil.
stages.hint: Ranger Sol guards the scorched route — only the worthy restore its resonance.

stages.title: Heart of the Grove
stages.objective: Reach the Verdant grove and defeat Ranger Ivy.
stages.hint: Ranger Ivy protects the grove's deepest memories.

stages.title: Two Truths
stages.objective: Face Rival Sabo one last time — The Veil and The Rangers both hold pieces of the truth.
stages.hint: Sabo makes a final stand in Verdant Route 3.

stages.title: Valley Restored?
stages.objective: You hold every Sigil — but will you restore The Chorus, preserve The Fracture, or find a new balance?
stages.hint: Keep exploring. Record discoveries in your Memory Archive.
